revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:MediaWiki:Titleblacklist-custom-editnotice]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Pages created from Interlanguage links
Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

revision.text:
{{fmbox | type = editnotice | image = [[File:MediaWiki Namespace.svg|45px]] | text =
{{#switch: {{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |2|0}} | Template:Editnotices/Namespace = This is the namespace notice for the '''{{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |0|3}}''' space. | Template:Editnotices/Group = This is the group notice for [[:{{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |0|3}}]] and all its subpages. | Template:Editnotices/Page = This is the page notice for [[:{{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |0|3}}]]. | Template:Editnotices/Protection = This is the protection notice for [[:{{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |0|3}}]]. | #default = '''Caution:''' It seems this is an editnotice with an '''invalid name'''. }}
'''This [[Wikipedia:Editnotice|editnotice]] can only be created or edited by [[Wikipedia:Administrators|administrators]], [[Wikipedia:Template editor|template editors]], and [[Wikipedia:Page mover|page movers]].'''
To request a change be made to the page, please {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|{{submit an edit request/link|type=template|display=submit an edit request}}|submit an edit request}}. Ensure you include a description of your requested change and the reason for the change.
}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting with templates included
revision.text:
{{fmbox | type = editnotice | image = [[File:MediaWiki Namespace.svg|45px]] | text =
{{#switch: {{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |2|0}} | Template:Editnotices/Namespace = This is the namespace notice for the '''{{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |0|3}}''' space. | Template:Editnotices/Group = This is the group notice for [[:{{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |0|3}}]] and all its subpages. | Template:Editnotices/Page = This is the page notice for [[:{{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |0|3}}]]. | Template:Editnotices/Protection = This is the protection notice for [[:{{#titleparts: {{FULLPAGENAME}} |0|3}}]]. | #default = '''Caution:''' It seems this is an editnotice with an '''invalid name'''. }}
'''This [[Wikipedia:Editnotice|editnotice]] can only be created or edited by [[Wikipedia:Administrators|administrators]], [[Wikipedia:Template editor|template editors]], and [[Wikipedia:Page mover|page movers]].'''
To request a change be made to the page, please {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|{{submit an edit request/link|type=template|display=submit an edit request}}|submit an edit request}}. Ensure you include a description of your requested change and the reason for the change.
}}
